title: Hazard Tape Warning Barrier Tape black and yellow 50mmx33m Strong Adhesive Safety Floor Marking Caution Warning Social Distancing Tape Indoor/Outdoor All-Weather (1, 50mmx33m)
features: High Visibility: The eye-catching black and yellow stripes are hard to miss, ensuring everyone knows where to tread carefully. Perfect for both indoor and outdoor use, this tape stands out on any surface, be it tile, wood, concrete, or metal.

Built to Last: Crafted from strong, flexible vinyl, this tape adapts effortlessly to irregular shapes and curves, ensuring a snug fit wherever it’s applied. Forget about curling edges or lifting corners, once it’s down, it stays down.

Strong Rubber Adhesive: With our pressure-sensitive adhesive rubber, you’ll get an instant bond that only gets stronger with time. Perfect for high-traffic areas, this tape sticks around without leaving a nasty residue when it’s time to remove it.

Weather-Resistant: Whether you’re battling rain, sun, or heavy machinery, our UV and moisture-resistant tape is up to the task. It’s durable enough to handle anything your environment throws at it, keeping your marked areas safe and visible.

Multi-Purpose Applications: From factories to schools, and even in your own home, this tape is perfect for marking hazardous areas. Use it to prevent slips, trips, and falls, because safety should never be an afterthought.
description: Product Description Floor Marking Tape High Visibility: The bold black and yellow color scheme of our floor marking tape ensures it stands out, providing clear and immediate identification of designated areas, hazard zones, and walkways. Even in dimly lit environments, its vibrant design enhances safety and awareness.
